positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a cosmic wave crashing over stylized mountain peaks. The style should be a blend of Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock printing and modern single-color linocut, featuring delicate, continuous flowing lines and strong, graphic silhouettes. Use a deep indigo and muted gold color palette. Composition must be centered and vertically balanced, optimized for apparel printing with high contrast between the black lines and the negative space. Ensure crisp edges and a clean, scalable aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
